name: RPlog_Squid_Lake_The_Eruption
title: An Angry Roar in the Deep
summary: Operation Squid Lake reaches its devastating climax as ISB agents, coordinated by the disguised Director Korynn Fleming, simultaneously poison Dac's Quarren food supply and sabotage a Mon Calamari bacta facility, killing everyone inside including the agents responsible. As tainted seafood spreads through the deep cities, Quarren begin dying en masse while Mon Calamari officials, indifferent to their neighbors, respond too slowly, and grief curdles into rage and burning streets. Word of the catastrophe finally reaches Chief of State Leia Organa Solo on Ord Mantell, who receives the Mon Calamari ambassador and then a distraught Quarren ambassador clutching reports from his aide Eeth Mentel, who blames the Calamari outright. Leia urges restraint and proposes a neutral Republic peacekeeping and relief force drawn from support command, but the Quarren ambassador insists on waiting for Mentel before any decision. In a later council with Ackbar, Madine, and Mentel, the leaders grant Leia emergency powers, and the Quarren ambassador grimly consents to peacekeepers while warning that his people's fury may yet break loose, exactly as the hidden Imperial plot intended.
